Veynte y dos.
2013-09-01 BDL: I'm not 100% sure of what the "l" 'or' refers to here. But based on "17" on Arte 99r, I think what I have here is right. GAB, MRO-- do you agree with my interpretation? GAB: I think Cordova probably intended cälle bicäto. Is that what your annotation means? 2013-10-12 BDL: yes, that's what I think it means, too. That's what I've got here now. This would be a good example of how difficult it is to interprest the Arte-- you have to understand the pattern around here to understand how to apply this.
